quality.rationale: 利用快度参数线性叠加推导多车相对论速度合成公式，物理逻辑严密且解答步骤完整

origin.question: Problem 1.4. A cart rolls on a long table with velocity $\beta$ . A smaller cart rolls on the first cart in the same direction with velocity $\beta$ relative to the first cart. A third cart rolls on the second cart in the same direction with relative velocity $\beta$ , and so on up to $n$ carts. What is the velocity $v_{n}$ of the $n$ th cart in the frame of the table? What does $v_{n}$ tend to as $n \to \inf ty$ ?
origin.solution: We use the fact that in one dimension the "rapidity parameter" $\theta \equiv \tan h^{-1} v$ adds linearly. Thus $\tan h^{-1} v_n = \theta_n = n\theta = n \tan h^{-1} \beta$ , or$$\begin{array}{l} v_{n} = \tan h (n \tan h^{- 1} \beta) \\= \tan h \log \left(\frac {1 + \beta}{1 - \beta}\right)^{n / 2} \quad (\text {e a s i l y v e r i f i e d !}) \\= \frac {1 - [ (1 - \beta) / (1 + \beta) ]^{n}}{1 + [ (1 - \beta) / (1 + \beta) ]^{n}}.\end{array}$$As $n\to \inf ty$ , $[(1 - \beta) / (1 + \beta)]^{\mathfrak{n}}\to 0$ and $\mathbf{v}_{\mathfrak{n}}\rightarrow \mathbf{1}$ , the speed of light.
